    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    ActivityLevel
    User activity level for TDEE calculation; display names match database values.
    AiModelService
    Service for ai model service operations.
    AiWorkoutController
    JavaFX controller for the ai workout screen.
    AiWorkoutService
    Service for ai workout service operations.
    AiWorkoutService.WorkoutResult
    Provides workout result functionality for LockedIn.
    Authentication
    Coordinates credential validation, login, and shared authentication UI helpers.
    CreateWorkoutController
    JavaFX controller for the create workout screen.
    CurrentUser
    Provides current user functionality for LockedIn.
    DBExercisesDAO
     
    DietController
    JavaFX controller for the diet screen.
    DietLogic
    Logic class for diet-related calculations and numeric input validation.
    Exercise
    Represents an exercise definition with metadata and demonstration image URLs.
    ExerciseSet
    Represents a single set performed for an exercise, including reps and weight.
    ExerciseViewController
    JavaFX controller for the exercise view screen.
    FitnessGoal
    User fitness goal for calorie and macro targets; display names match database values.
    Food
    Represents a food entry logged by a user, including macros and the consumption date.
    FoodDAO
    Data access object for food records.
    ForgotPasswordController
    JavaFX controller for the forgot password screen.
    JohnDemoSeeder
    Seeds a demo user "John" with sample diet, workout, and progress data for demonstrations.
    LayoutController
    JavaFX controller for the layout screen.
    LockedIn
    Provides locked in functionality for LockedIn.
    LogInController
    JavaFX controller for the log in screen.
    OTP
    Provides otp functionality for LockedIn.
    OtpDAO
    Data access object for otp records.
    ProfileController
    JavaFX controller for the profile screen.
    SendEmail
    Provides send email functionality for LockedIn.
    SignUpController
    JavaFX controller for the sign up screen.
    SqliteConnection
    Provides sqlite connection functionality for LockedIn.
    StartWorkoutController
    JavaFX controller for the start workout screen.
    User
    Represents a user profile with authentication data and fitness calculation helpers.
    UserDAO
    Data access object for user records.
    UserProgress
    Provides user progress functionality for LockedIn.
    UserProgressDAO
     
    WorkoutController
    JavaFX controller for the workout screen.
    WorkoutDetailController
    JavaFX controller for the workout detail screen.
    WorkoutExerciseEntry
    Represents one exercise slot in a routine with sets, reps, and rest time.
    WorkoutHistoryController
    JavaFX controller for the workout history screen.
    WorkoutRoutine
    Represents a workout routine with metadata and tracked sets per exercise.
    WorkoutRoutineDAO
    Data access object for workout routine records.
    WorkoutRoutineDAO.CompletedSetData
    Provides completed set data functionality for LockedIn.
    WorkoutRoutineDAO.CompletedWorkoutData
    Provides completed workout data functionality for LockedIn.
    WorkoutRoutineDAO.RoutineData
    Provides routine data functionality for LockedIn.
